description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a hedgehog, featuring a rounded, slightly elongated body covered in dense, short spines that are light brown with darker tips. The spines are concentrated on the back and sides, while the underside and face are covered in softer, lighter fur. The head is small and pointed, with a distinct snout, small round ears, and beady dark eyes. The nose is dark and moist-looking, and the mouth is subtle, blending into the snout. Four short limbs are visible, with small feet that are partially tucked under the body. The coloration transitions smoothly from the darker, patterned back to the pale, almost pinkish face and underbelly, giving the animal a natural and lifelike appearance.
description: A lifelike hedgehog with a spiny, brown-patterned back, a pointed snout, and small limbs partially visible beneath its rounded body. The face and underside are lighter in color, contrasting with the dense spines on its back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hedgehog, with its pointed snout, small ear, and two limbs visible beneath the spiny, rounded body.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the oval shape and dense, patterned spines covering the back, with only the tips of the limbs visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the hedgehog, with the snout, ear, and two limbs visible beneath the spiny body.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the pointed snout, both small ears, and the symmetrical arrangement of spines radiating from the head, with the forelimbs just visible below.
attribute_spine_arrangement: The spines are densely packed and cover the entire back and sides, radiating outward in a slightly curved pattern. They are shorter and more closely clustered near the head, becoming slightly longer and sparser toward the mid-back and rump. The spines do not extend onto the face or underside, where softer fur is present.
attribute_facial_features: The hedgehog's face features a long, pointed snout with a small, dark nose at the tip and a subtle mouth line. The eyes are small, round, and dark, set slightly to the sides of the head. The facial fur is lighter in color, with a smooth texture and no distinct markings.
attribute_limb_visibility: Both forelimbs and hindlimbs are partially visible from the side views, with the limbs tucked close to the body and partially obscured by the spines and fur. The limbs are short and positioned beneath the body, with only the feet extending slightly outward.
attribute_ear_shape: The ears are small, rounded, and set high on the sides of the head, with a slight outward orientation. They have a smooth surface and are covered in light fur, blending in with the facial coloration.
attribute_posture: The hedgehog is depicted in an extended, walking posture with its body low to the ground and limbs positioned beneath it. The head is slightly forward, and the animal appears alert and ready to move.
